name: Unit 4609, Downtown Views
description: Downtown Views promises the pinnacle of urban living with awe-inspiring vistas of Burj Khalifa, The Dubai Fountain and the Dubai cityscape. Within walking distance from The Dubai Mall, their one, two, three and four-bedroom apartments are set amidst legendary surroundings. Brought to you by Emaar - One of the world's leading developers providing real estate & commercial properties. Downtown Views  is conveniently located adjacent to Downtown Dubai on the primary Financial Centre Road and Al Sa’adat Street. Its proximity to Sheikh Zayed Road and Al Khail Road ensures excellent inbound and outbound access to the city, including Dubai International Finance Centre and the white sandy beaches of the Arabian Gulf.

name: Unit 303, Asayel 1
description:
Welcome to Bellaviu Holiday Homes, offers a perfect blend of modern comfort and classic Arabian charm—ideal for leisure travellers, business visitors, couples, and families seeking a peaceful stay just minutes from Dubai’s most iconic attractions.
Situated in the heart of Madinat Jumeirah Living, with quick access to Burj Al Arab, Mall of the Emirates, and Jumeirah Beachfront, this space is ideal for both leisure and business travellers seeking elegance and convenience.
The space
■ 3 Bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, premium linens, and stylish, cozy furnishings
■ 3 Modern Bathrooms equipped with walk-in showers, fresh towels, and complimentary toiletries
■ Spacious Open-Concept Living & Dining Area with a Smart TV and comfortable seating for relaxation or entertainment
■ Fully Equipped Kitchen featuring modern appliances, cookware, and all dining essentials for a hassle-free stay
■ Dedicated Laundry Area with washer, iron, and ironing board for your convenience
■ High-Speed Wi-Fi available throughout the apartment
■ Ideal for up to 6 guests — perfect for families, groups of friends, or business travellers
Guest access
During your stay, you'll have full access to:
■ Swimming pool
■ Gymnasium
■ Children’s play area
■ 24/7 concierge and security
■ Free on-site parking

name: Unit 5108, Noora Tower
description:
Welcome to Bellaviu Holiday Homes, a stylish and contemporary 2-bedroom apartment located in Noora Tower, Al Habtoor City. Designed for both comfort and sophistication, this well-appointed space offers a serene escape with panoramic views of the Dubai skyline.
Perfectly situated just minutes away from Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, and Business Bay, it’s the ideal destination for both business and leisure travellers seeking convenience, luxury, and a true taste of city living.
The space
■ 2 Bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, premium linens, and cozy furnishings
■ 2.5 Bathrooms equipped with showers, fresh towels, and complimentary toiletries
■ Open-Concept Living & Dining Area with a Smart TV and comfortable seating
■ Fully Equipped Kitchen featuring modern appliances, cookware, and dining essentials
■ Laundry Area with washer, iron, and ironing board for your convenience
■ High-Speed Wi-Fi throughout the apartment
■ Ideal for up to 4 guests, perfect for families, friends, or business travellers
Guest access
During your stay, you'll have full access to:
■ Swimming pool
■ Gymnasium
■ Children’s play area
■ 24/7 concierge and security
■ Free on-site parking
■ Retail shops and cafes within the complex
Other things to note
In accordance with building regulations, all check-ins must be completed in person with a member of our team present. One of our dedicated team members will meet you at the property to assist with the check-in process and ensure everything is in order for your stay.
• Late Check-In: A fee of 100 AED applies for arrivals after 10:00 PM. To ensure a smooth and hassle-free arrival, our team will personally assist you during the check-in.
• Guest Identification: A digital copy of your Passport or Emirates ID is required prior to arrival, as per building policy.
Additional Services (extra charges apply)
• Early Check-In – Subject to availability
• Late Check-Out – Subject to availability
• Extra Linen, Towels, or Pillows – Available upon request
• Daily Housekeeping Service – Optional, available for an additional fee
• Access Card Replacement – Applicable if lost

name: Unit 3709, Noora Tower
description:
Bellaviu Holiday Homes, Welcome to your tranquil urban retreat at Skyline Serenity, located in the heart of Downtown Dubai — moments from the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall. This thoughtfully styled 2-bedrooms apartment offers modern luxury and panoramic city views, ideal for both business and leisure travelers.
The space
Step into a bright and inviting home designed with your comfort in mind:
■ 2 bedrooms
■ 2.5 bathrooms with toiletries and shower
■ Open-plan living and dining area with designer furnishings
■ Fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances and dining ware
■ In-unit laundry with washer, iron, and board
■ High-speed Wi-Fi & Smart TV
■ Ideal for up to 4 guests
Guest access
Enjoy full access to the building’s luxury amenities:
■ Swimming pool
■ Gymnasium
■ 24/7 concierge and security
■ Free on-site parking
Located in a prime area, you’re just steps away from iconic landmarks, fine dining, and Dubai’s buzzing nightlife.
Other things to note
As part of the building regulations, we kindly request guests to provide digital copies of Passport ID or Emirates ID prior to check-in. This helps ensure a seamless check-in process with the building’s front desk.

Additional Services (Extra Charges will apply)
• Early Check-In – Subject to availability
• Late Check-Out – Subject to availability
• Extra Linen, Towels, or Pillows – Available upon request
• Daily Housekeeping Service – Optional, with extra charge
• Access Card Replacement (if lost)

In the case of long-stay bookings, the Tourism Fee applies exclusively to the first 30 consecutive nights. A charge of 20AED per night
Registration Details
BUS-NOU-3VOQF

name: Unit 3105, Noora Tower
description: Noura Tower is a premium luxury residential skyscraper located in the heart of Al Habtoor City, Dubai. As part of the Habtoor Residence Collection, this high-end tower offers spacious apartments with stunning views of the Dubai Water Canal and the iconic Burj Khalifa skyline. With world-class amenities, elegant interiors, and a prime location, Noura Tower delivers an unparalleled living experience.

name: Unit 2615 DAMAC Maison Prive A
description: Set along the scenic banks of Dubai Canal, the waterfront apartments at DAMAC Privé embody luxurious living in a prestigious location. Residents enjoy exceptional views of the canal from homes crafted to the highest standards, offering spacious layouts and refined finishes that elevate everyday living. This exclusive tower features a range of amenities tailored for comfort and leisure, seamlessly connecting residents to Dubai’s vibrant lifestyle

name: Unit 2203, DAMAC Maison Prive A
description: Damac Maison Prive is a luxurious residential development located in Business Bay, Dubai, offering fully furnished serviced apartments with world-class amenities. This high-end property provides a blend of comfort, elegance, and convenience, making it an ideal choice for residents and travelers seeking a premium living experience in the heart of Dubai.

name: Unit 3106 DAMAC Maison Prive B
description: Set along the scenic banks of Dubai Canal, the waterfront apartments at DAMAC Privé embody luxurious living in a prestigious location. Residents enjoy exceptional views of the canal from homes crafted to the highest standards, offering spacious layouts and refined finishes that elevate everyday living. This exclusive tower features a range of amenities tailored for comfort and leisure, seamlessly connecting residents to Dubai’s vibrant lifestyle.

name: Unit 805, Damac paramount
description: DAMAC Towers by Paramount Hotels & Resorts Dubai is a complex of four skyscrapers located in Business Bay, Dubai. The complex was first announced in 2016 and will be completed in 2020.[1] Each of the four buildings will be 270 metres (890 ft) tall with 68 stories each .The complex was launched by Paramount Hotels & Resorts partnered with DAMAC Properties on 12 March. The Damac Towers project is Paramount Hotels & Resorts first venture into the hotel and real estate industry

name: Safeer Tower 2 - UNit 702
description:
Enjoy breathtaking Burj Khalifa views from this modern studio located in Safeer Tower 2, right in the heart of Business Bay—one of Dubai’s most vibrant and central neighborhoods.

This stylish and well-equipped studio is ideal for business travelers, solo adventurers, or couples, offering the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and unforgettable skyline views.
The space
This fully furnished studio apartment offers a perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience. With panoramic views of the Burj Khalifa, modern interiors, and access to top-notch building amenities, this space is ideal for short stays, business trips, or longer getaways.
Guest access
Direct view of the Burj Khalifa from your window

Comfortable queen-sized bed and cozy living area

Fully equipped kitchen (fridge, stove, microwave, kettle, cookware)

Fast Wi-Fi, Smart TV, air conditioning

Washer and plenty of storage space
Registration Details
BUS-SAF-FTNSB

name: Unit 4004, Creek Edge Tower 1
description: Emaar Properties is introducing its new development Creek Edge, offering elegant designed 2  bedroom apartments  located at Dubai Creek Harbour. Innovated with the artistically designed units, elegantly presenting the beauty of the waterfront development that makes a unique destination choice for the residents.

name: Beach vista
description: Exclusive apartments in Dubai overlooking the sea. Brought to you by Emaar - One of the world's leading developers providing real estate & commercial properties. Beach Vista is a unique seaside residence that combines urban experience with an island lifestyle in the heart of Emaar Beachfront. Select between 1-4 bedroom apartments rising above the crystal-blue waters of the Arabian Gulf, and have the beach as your backyard and cosmopolitan living on your doorstep.

name: Binghatti House
description: Binghatti is a leading real estate development company in the UAE, recognized by numerous international awards such as the International Property Awards, and Forbes Middle East’s list of ‘Top 100 real estate companies in the Arab world’. The company is headed by CEO and Head of Architecture Muhammad Binghatti

name: Binghatti Corner
description: Binghatti Corner is a modern residential development by Binghatti Developers, located in the prime area of Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), Dubai. Designed with contemporary architecture and Binghatti’s signature artistic facade, this high-rise tower offers luxurious yet affordable living with stunning views and top-tier amenities.

name: 17 Icon Bay
description: 17 Icon Bay is a luxurious residential tower by Emaar Properties, located in Dubai Creek Harbour, offering breathtaking views of the Dubai skyline, Creek Tower, and lush parklands. Designed for sophisticated urban living, this high-rise development provides an elegant waterfront lifestyle with world-class amenities and seamless connectivity to Dubai’s key landmarks.

name: Burj Royal
description: Burj Royal is a prestigious residential development by Emaar Properties, located in the heart of Downtown Dubai, near the iconic Burj Khalifa. This luxury high-rise offers elegantly designed apartments with breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and The Dubai Fountain. With modern architecture, premium interiors, and world-class amenities, Burj Royal is an ideal choice for those seeking an upscale urban lifestyle.

name: Binghatti Lavender
description: Binghatti Lavender is a premium residential development by Binghatti Developers, located in the sought-after community of Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), Dubai. With its signature architectural design, high-end finishes, and state-of-the-art amenities, Binghatti Lavender offers an elegant blend of luxury and affordability, making it an ideal home for modern urban living.

name: Binghatti onyx
description: Binghatti Onyx is a premium residential development by Binghatti Developers, strategically located in Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), Dubai. With its unique architectural design, luxurious interiors, and state-of-the-art amenities, Binghatti Onyx offers an elegant and modern lifestyle, catering to both homeowners and investors.

name: Binghatti orchid 801
description: Binghatti Orchid 801 is a luxurious residential development by Binghatti Developers, situated in the vibrant community of Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), Dubai. Designed with Binghatti’s signature architectural elegance, this high-rise tower offers modern apartments, world-class amenities, and a strategic location, making it an ideal choice for families, professionals, and investors.

name: Binghatti Amber
description: Binghatti Amber is an elegant residential development located in the heart of Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), Dubai. Designed with modern architectural brilliance and signature Binghatti design elements, this stunning property offers a selection of thoughtfully crafted apartments. With exceptional amenities, premium finishes, and a vibrant community atmosphere, Binghatti Amber provides a sophisticated yet comfortable lifestyle for residents seeking contemporary urban living in one of Dubai’s most desirable neighborhoods.
